data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of changes made, specifically who changed what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly confirm the existence of such an audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that this functionality is implemented, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of an audit trail for changes made.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of an audit trail.
